value.found_quote: Subagents run asynchronously in the background, allowing the parent agent to delegate a task and immediately resume its own work.
value.rationale: The page is titled "Asynchronous Subagents" and describes the main agent delegating parallel background tasks to concurrent subagents that run asynchronously without blocking the parent's work, matching the claim. It presents this as a current capability of Antigravity 2.0.
